data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific availability', but the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that appointments can auto-transfer to the nearest location with capacity, there is no evidence demonstrating that the system accurately reflects location-specific availability for bookings. Therefore, this results in a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system supports location-specific availability for bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
